summary: Add session timeout and absolute session lifetime enforcement for browser sessions
Add failed login tracking and temporary lockout support for DB-backed users
Enforce password policy on self-service password change and admin password reset/create user
Add audit log page and JSON route at /access/audit
Add config change preview on /access before approval/apply
Add additive migration for security columns and audit indexes
post_deploy_checks: Apply app/sql/007_security.sql to db_monitor before browser login tests
Test failed login lockout on a non-admin DB-backed account in test environment
rollback: Restore files from baseline package R3.1.3-ws4
No destructive schema rollback required; 007_security.sql is additive only
